title: ADULT MENTAL HEALTH - 211info
text: YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ADULT MENTAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental-health services for adults, including evaluation, consultation, treatment, and referrals. Treatment includes individual and group therapy, case management, medication support, and supported housing. 627 NE Evans Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older, experiencing a serious mental illness or are in psychiatric crisis Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm; some Saturdays by appointment only (503) 434-7523 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 434-7523 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for information FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees and payment plans available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable, proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Group Counseling Individual Counseling Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ABACUS FOR YOUTH AND ADULTS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YAMHILL COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
